okay so i tried setting up typescript like a year ago. absolute mess.
i’m looking at this tsconfig.json file like... what IS this? looked like someone's fever dream. spent 45 minutes just trying to figure out what half the options even did. felt like i needed a computer science degree just to make a red line appear.

I almost gave up. like legit was about to be “nah this is too much.”
then i realized something. tooling is actually way better now. not nearly as complicated as i made it in my head. you can literally just… start using it. no crazy config for basic stuff.
so i’m gonna show you how to actually do this. not some perfect tutorial. just step by step what happens when you try it. confusion, red lines, all of it.
by the end you’ll have a .ts file running. it'll make sense. or at least more sense than right now.
Step 1: Install It
you need a project. any javascript thing. react, express, script, anything.
